meaning: n.善于变戏法的人,魔术师,术士
examples: The magician vanished in a puff of smoke.
The magician took the boy into a secret room.
As a magician, his reputation spread all over the world.
In the investment world, hedge fund star Joel Greenblatt is something of a magician.
State Farm and its continual cast of celebrities, lately including the magician David Copperfield.
